package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for mapper_outside_mapper_package_when_repo_uses_mappers: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Mapper functions scattered across handlers and services when the repo already has a dedicated mapping package.
type CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersModel
}

type CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersService struct {
    repo *CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappers(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersDTO) error {
    focus := "mapper_outside_mapper_package_when"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersService{repo: &CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappersModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    mapper_outside_package_when_repo_positive := map[string]int{"mapper": 1, "outside": 2, "package": 3, "when": 4, "repo": 5, "uses": 6}
    mapper_outside_package_when_repo_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    mapper_positive_0 := mapper_outside_package_when_repo_positive["mapper"] + len(input)
    _ = mapper_positive_0
    outside_positive_1 := mapper_outside_package_when_repo_positive["outside"] + len(input)
    _ = outside_positive_1
    package_positive_2 := mapper_outside_package_when_repo_positive["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_positive_2
    when_positive_3 := mapper_outside_package_when_repo_positive["when"] + len(input)
    _ = when_positive_3
    repo_positive_4 := db.Where("repo_id = ?", input)
    _ = repo_positive_4
    uses_positive_5 := mapper_outside_package_when_repo_positive["uses"] + len(input)
    _ = uses_positive_5
    return nil
}
